title: caltha palustris var. normalis
intro: Caltha palustris var. normalis, also known as Marsh Marigold, is a flowering plant that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to aid in wound healing and reduce the risk of infections. The health benefits of Caltha palustris var. normalis include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and exhibiting antioxidant properties that can protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although proper dosages and preparation methods should be consulted with a medical professional.
